equipment.name: Backpack
equipment.desc: A leather pack carried on the back. Holds up to 30 lb in 1 cubic foot.

equipment.name: Bedroll
equipment.desc: A portable sleeping mat made of cloth and padding.

equipment.name: Blanket
equipment.desc: A thick wool blanket for warmth.

equipment.name: Caltrops (bag of 20)
equipment.desc: As an action, scatter caltrops in a 5-foot-square area. Creatures entering the area must succeed on DC 15 DEX save or stop and take 1 piercing damage. Speed is reduced by 10 ft until healed.

equipment.name: Candle
equipment.desc: For 1 hour, sheds bright light in a 5-foot radius and dim light for an additional 5 feet.

equipment.name: Chain (10 feet)
equipment.desc: A 10-foot length of chain with 10 hit points. Can be burst with a DC 20 STR check.

equipment.name: Crowbar
equipment.desc: Using a crowbar grants advantage on STR checks where leverage can be applied.

equipment.name: Fishing Tackle
equipment.desc: A hook, line, sinkers, floats, and a short fishing rod.

equipment.name: Grappling Hook
equipment.desc: A hook attached to a rope that can be thrown and used to anchor the rope.

equipment.name: Hammer
equipment.desc: A small hammer used for driving pitons and similar tasks.

equipment.name: Healer's Kit
equipment.desc: A pouch of bandages, salves, and splints (10 uses). As an action, stabilize a dying creature without a medicine check.

equipment.name: Holy Water (flask)
equipment.desc: As an action, splash a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet. Fiends and undead take 2d6 radiant damage on a hit.

equipment.name: Hunting Trap
equipment.desc: Snaps shut when triggered. Creatures stepping on the trap take 1d4 piercing damage and stop moving. DC 13 STR to escape.

equipment.name: Ink (1 ounce bottle)
equipment.desc: A small bottle of ink for writing.

equipment.name: Ink Pen
equipment.desc: A quill or reed pen for writing with ink.

equipment.name: Lamp
equipment.desc: A lamp casts bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet when fueled with oil.

equipment.name: Lantern, Bullseye
equipment.desc: Casts bright light in a 60-foot cone and dim light for an additional 60 feet when fueled with oil.

equipment.name: Lantern, Hooded
equipment.desc: Casts bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Hood can be closed to reduce to dim light in a 5-foot radius.

equipment.name: Lock
equipment.desc: A padlock with a key. DC 15 Dexterity (Thieves' Tools) check to pick without the key.

equipment.name: Magnifying Glass
equipment.desc: Grants advantage on ability checks to identify the nature of a fine-crafted item. Ignites dry tinder when focused sunlight on it.

equipment.name: Manacles
equipment.desc: Can bind a Small or Medium creature. Escape DC 20 DEX (thieves' tools) or DC 20 STR. Each set comes with one key.

equipment.name: Mirror, Steel
equipment.desc: A small polished steel mirror, useful for signaling, checking around corners, or looking at a medusa.

equipment.name: Oil (flask)
equipment.desc: Splash as action in 5 ft or throw up to 20 ft. Hit creature takes 5 fire damage. Area of oil burns for 2 rounds dealing 5 fire damage.

equipment.name: Parchment (one sheet)
equipment.desc: A sheet of prepared animal skin for writing.

equipment.name: Piton
equipment.desc: A metal spike hammered into stone or ice to serve as an anchor.

equipment.name: Poison, Basic (vial)
equipment.desc: Apply to a weapon or piece of ammunition. Creature hit must make DC 10 CON save or take 1d4+2 poison damage. Effective for 1 minute.

equipment.name: Pole (10-foot)
equipment.desc: A 10-foot wooden pole useful for probing ahead or creating a makeshift stretcher.

equipment.name: Pouch
equipment.desc: A cloth or leather pouch that can hold up to 6 pounds / 1/5 cubic foot in components or coins.

equipment.name: Rations (1 day)
equipment.desc: Compact, dry foods suitable for extended travel, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

equipment.name: Rope, Hempen (50 feet)
equipment.desc: 50 ft of hemp rope. Has 2 HP and can be burst with a DC 17 STR check.

equipment.name: Rope, Silk (50 feet)
equipment.desc: 50 ft of lighter, stronger silk rope. Can be burst with a DC 20 STR check.

equipment.name: Sack
equipment.desc: A cloth sack that can hold up to 30 pounds / 1 cubic foot.

equipment.name: Shovel
equipment.desc: A standard digging implement.

equipment.name: Signal Whistle
equipment.desc: A small whistle that produces a shrill signal sound.

equipment.name: Spellbook
equipment.desc: Essential for wizards, this leather-bound tome holds up to 100 spells. Includes blank vellum pages for copying new spells.

equipment.name: Spyglass
equipment.desc: Objects viewed through the spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

equipment.name: Tent, Two-Person
equipment.desc: A simple and portable canvas shelter that sleeps two.

equipment.name: Tinderbox
equipment.desc: Contains a flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually charred cloth). Light a torch or tinder as an action, or a fire in 1 minute.

equipment.name: Torch
equipment.desc: Burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. On hit, deals 1 fire damage.

equipment.name: Vial
equipment.desc: A small glass container with a stopper. Holds 4 ounces of liquid.

equipment.name: Waterskin
equipment.desc: A leather pouch for holding water or other beverages. Holds 4 pints of liquid (weighs 5 lb when full, 0.5 lb when empty).

equipment.name: Whetstone
equipment.desc: A flat stone used for sharpening bladed weapons.

equipment.name: Arrows (20)
equipment.desc: 20 arrows for use with a bow. Each arrow weighs 0.05 lb.

equipment.name: Crossbow Bolts (20)
equipment.desc: 20 bolts for use with crossbows.

equipment.name: Blowgun Needles (50)
equipment.desc: 50 needles for use with a blowgun.

equipment.name: Sling Bullets (20)
equipment.desc: 20 lead bullets for use with a sling.

equipment.name: Crystal
equipment.desc: An arcane focus in the form of a crystal. Can be used as a spellcasting focus for wizard and sorcerer spells.

equipment.name: Orb
equipment.desc: A glass or crystal sphere that serves as an arcane spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Rod
equipment.desc: A metal rod that serves as an arcane spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Staff (Arcane Focus)
equipment.desc: A wooden staff that serves as an arcane spellcasting focus. Can also be used as a quarterstaff.

equipment.name: Wand
equipment.desc: A short wooden wand that serves as an arcane spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Mistletoe
equipment.desc: Sprigs of mistletoe that serve as a druidic spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Totem
equipment.desc: A carved animal figure that serves as a druidic spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Wooden Staff
equipment.desc: A staff of wood carved with natural motifs, used as a druidic spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Yew Wand
equipment.desc: A wand carved from yew wood, used as a druidic spellcasting focus.

equipment.name: Amulet
equipment.desc: A holy symbol worn as a necklace. Can be used as a spellcasting focus for cleric and paladin spells.

equipment.name: Emblem
equipment.desc: A holy symbol worn as a badge or pin, embossed on a shield, or emblazoned on clothing.

equipment.name: Reliquary
equipment.desc: A small container that holds a relic of significance to a deity, used as a holy symbol.

equipment.name: Alchemist's Supplies
equipment.desc: Includes vials, burners, flasks, and other equipment. Proficiency allows creating alchemical substances and identifying chemicals.

equipment.name: Brewer's Supplies
equipment.desc: Includes a large glass jug, hops, a siphon, and several feet of tubing. Used to create ales and other beverages.

equipment.name: Calligrapher's Supplies
equipment.desc: Includes ink, a dozen sheets of parchment, and three quills. Used to create written works.

equipment.name: Carpenter's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a saw, hammer, nails, a hatchet, a square, a ruler, an adze, a plane, and a chisel.

equipment.name: Cartographer's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a quill, ink, parchment, a compass, calipers, and rulers for mapmaking.

equipment.name: Cobbler's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a hammer, awl, knife, shoe stand, and supplies for making or repairing footwear.

equipment.name: Cook's Utensils
equipment.desc: Includes metal pots, pans, ladles, tongs, and other cooking equipment.

equipment.name: Disguise Kit
equipment.desc: This pouch of cosmetics, hair dye, and small props allows disguises. Proficiency adds bonus to Charisma (Deception) checks.

equipment.name: Forgery Kit
equipment.desc: A small box with papers, parchments, inks, seals, and wax for forging documents.

equipment.name: Gaming Set (Dice)
equipment.desc: A set of polyhedral dice and a pouch. Proficiency allows advantage on related games of chance.

equipment.name: Herbalism Kit
equipment.desc: Includes clippers, mortar and pestle, pouches, and vials. Used to identify and prepare herbal remedies, including antitoxin and healer's kit components.

equipment.name: Jeweler's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes pliers, files, and a jeweler's loupe. Used to identify gems and create jewelry.

equipment.name: Leatherworker's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a knife, awl, needles, thread, and a wooden form for working leather.

equipment.name: Mason's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a trowel, hammer, chisel, brushes, and a square for stonework.

equipment.name: Navigator's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes charts, a compass, calipers, a ruler, sextant, and telescope for maritime navigation.

equipment.name: Painter's Supplies
equipment.desc: Includes an easel, canvas, paints, brushes, charcoal, and palette for creating works of art.

equipment.name: Poisoner's Kit
equipment.desc: Includes vials, chemicals, and a mortar and pestle. Proficiency allows creating and harvesting poisons.

equipment.name: Smith's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes hammers, tongs, a file, a whetstone, and a punch for blacksmithing.

equipment.name: Thieves' Tools
equipment.desc: Includes small files, a set of lockpicks, a small mirror, scissors, and pliers. Proficiency required to use effectively for picking locks and disarming traps.

equipment.name: Tinker's Tools
equipment.desc: Includes a variety of hand tools, thread, needles, a whetstone, scraps of cloth and leather, and a small pot of glue.

equipment.name: Burglar's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, ball bearings (bag of 1000), string (10 feet), a bell, candles (5), a crowbar, a hammer, pitons (10), a hooded lantern, flasks of oil (2), 5-day rations, a tinderbox, and a waterskin. The pack also has 50 feet of hempen rope strapped to the side of it.

equipment.name: Diplomat's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a chest, 2 cases for maps and scrolls, a set of fine clothes, a bottle of ink, an ink pen, a lamp, 2 flasks of oil, 5 sheets of paper, a vial of perfume, sealing wax, and soap.

equipment.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, a crowbar, a hammer, 10 pitons, 10 torches, a tinderbox, 10 days of rations, and a waterskin. The pack also has 50 feet of hempen rope strapped to the side of it.

equipment.name: Entertainer's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, a bedroll, 2 costumes, 5 candles, 5 days of rations, a waterskin, and a disguise kit.

equipment.name: Explorer's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, a bedroll, a mess kit, a tinderbox, 10 torches, 10 days of rations, and a waterskin. The pack also has 50 feet of hempen rope strapped to the side of it.

equipment.name: Priest's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, a blanket, 10 candles, a tinderbox, an alms box, 2 blocks of incense, a censer, vestments, 2 days of rations, and a waterskin.

equipment.name: Scholar's Pack
equipment.desc: Includes a backpack, a book of lore, a bottle of ink, an ink pen, 10 sheets of parchment, a little bag of sand, and a small knife.
